title: How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a digital creator from Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, tired of being blocked by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements? You're not alone. Many creatives face similar challenges. But what if you could sell ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, presets, beats, and plugins with cryptocurrency, without relying on these platforms? This post will guide you through a step-by-step setup to get started.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

This method works because it bypasses the traditional payment processor gatekeepers that often hinder creators from restricted countries. By leveraging cryptocurrency and a custom-built payment and delivery pipeline, you can sell your digital products without the need for PayPal, Stripe, or other platforms that block your region. This approach also provides you with full control over your sales and customer relationships, giving you the freedom to focus on creating more content and growing your audience.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need a digital product to sell, such as an ebook, course, or template. You'll also require a website or sales page to host your product and integrate the payment and delivery pipeline. Don't worry if you're not a web developer; there are user-friendly tools and platforms available to help you create a professional-looking site. Additionally, you'll need to set up a cryptocurrency wallet to accept payments from your customers.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports 300+ cryptocurrencies and doesn't require KYC or a buyer account. You'll also need the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration ($19.99), which provides multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. Once integrated, this pipeline will automate the payment and delivery process, ensuring your customers receive their digital products instantly after payment.
You can sell digital products in 300+ cryptocurrencies using NOWPayments.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

To go live, create a sales page on your website, add your digital product, and integrate the payment and delivery pipeline. Make sure to test your setup thoroughly to ensure a seamless experience for your customers. Once you're confident that everything is working as expected, promote your product to your audience and start selling. The first sale is a significant milestone, and it will validate your efforts and setup.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Scaling a crypto-native digital store does not require changing infrastructure at any particular revenue level. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification and delivery through the same webhook pipeline whether you are processing five orders a month or five hundred. GitHub Pages scales to any traffic level automatically. NOWPayments handles volume without per-transaction approval delays. The only constraint as you scale is marketing — the technical infrastructure is the same on day one as it is at significant revenue. This is a meaningful advantage over platform-based alternatives where payout policies, fee structures, and compliance requirements often change as your volume increases.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Web3 Wallet Connect provides instant automated delivery for digital products.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a platform to sell digital downloads without fees, consider using Unchained Commerce's Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Our system allows you to sell ebooks, courses, templates, and more without relying on platforms like Gumroad or Payhip. By leveraging cryptocurrency and our user-friendly tools, you can create a seamless buying experience for your customers and maximize your revenue.
Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
Unchained Commerce's Shop is a cryptocurrency-based digital download store with no fees.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
